name: Shadows over Innistrad
collationMethod: sequential, C1/C2 commons (modified for fewer commons per pack)

draft.notes: Pack has only 9 commons because it includes a dedicated double-faced card (DFC) slot. Structure: 9 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 DFC (common/uncommon), then a basic land OR checklist, then an ad card. A rare/mythic DFC appears 1/8 of the time (replaces a common, and forces a rare checklist in that pack). Foil displaces a common; cannot get a rare/mythic DFC and a foil in the same pack. [Refined: added dedicated DFC slot (filter: double_faced) so the pack totals 15.]

statedRates: Rare/mythic double-faced card appears 1/8 of packs. Foil 1:67.
sourceNotes: Large set with three variations of each standard basic land and 33 double-faced cards. The DFC slot is in addition to the standard 14 game cards (commons reduced from 10 to 9 to make room). Land slot is a basic land or checklist. US printing sequential collation with modified C1/C2 common collation. 36 packs per box.
